center.name: Wilhelm Meise
center.summary: Wilhelm Meise是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括祁连山蓝尾鸲，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Qilian bluetail (Tarsiger albocoeruleus) is a small passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is found in north-central China
